response.justification: Candidate exceeds the 15-year engineering requirement with 20 years of strong full-stack and infrastructure experience, plus entrepreneurial credentials. However, the role explicitly demands 'recognized expertise in AI with demonstrated products or platforms built with AI,' which the resume does not evidence. While current work at re:cinq includes AI-agent infrastructure and MCP frameworks—a promising signal—this appears very recent and insufficient to claim AI specialization. The candidate is a capable engineer and leader, but lacks the demonstrated AI expertise and strategic vision the director-level role requires.
strengths: 20 years of engineering experience across multiple domains (web, mobile, embedded, infrastructure) significantly exceeds the 15-year minimum
Founder of GISCollective demonstrates entrepreneurial capability and ability to ship real products adopted by organizations like Green Map
Recent AI-agent infrastructure and MCP code generator work at re:cinq shows active engagement with current AI tooling and frameworks
concerns: Career is fundamentally backend/full-stack engineering, not AI-specialized; no demonstrated AI products, ML expertise, or strategic AI platform development
No Master's degree or PhD in AI-related field (preferred qualification), and no evidence of formal AI/ML study or research background
Limited evidence of director-level strategic thinking, advising customers on technology adoption, or shaping organizational product direction at scale

key_factors.factor: Recent AI infrastructure work signals potential direction
